meaning: [复]n.<美>粗蓝布裤,蓝布牛仔裤,蓝"紧士"裤(原为工作裤,现为年轻人喜穿的一种便裤)
examples: I want to die with my bluejeans on.
I wish I could invent something like bluejeans.
They make snaps for baby onesies, buttons for Wrangler bluejeans and chin-strap fasteners for football helmets.
When it was over, a downcast Griffin arrived at the postgame podium wearing an unpretentious Redskins polo jersey and bluejeans.
Dressed in a black suit jacket and bluejeans, the younger Mr. Rajaratnam sat calmly and answered the judge's questions during the hearing on Monday.
